**🎛️ VOZZ RICH - ELECTRONIC PRESS KIT**  
*Cultural Fusion Maestro | Genre-Defying House & Techno*  
[Official Website](https://vozzrich.com/) | [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/27sSKrytmUXukDnMGPXNHQ) | [Instagram](https://instagram.com/vozzrich)

---

### **🎧 SOUND PROFILE**  
Blending **Detroit house grit**, **Latin rhythms**, and **big room energy** into a globetrotting sonic signature.  
- 🛠️ **Production Style**: Modular synth experimentation meets salsa-inspired percussion  
- 🌎 **Influences**: Underground rave culture, techno minimalism, Californian festival energy  

---

### **🔥 NOTABLE WORKS**  
**Key Releases (2023–2024)**:  
- *Breathless* (w/ L25) – 240K+ Spotify streams  
- *Butterflies – Vozz Rich Remix* (w/ Artsychoke) – Peak #12 Beatport Remix Chart  
- *House Ablaze* (Dec 2024) – 18K+ SoundCloud plays in first month  
- *Wake the Neighbors* – Featured on SiriusXM BPM  

**Notable Collaborations**:  
- L25  
- Franz Kolo  
- Kelly Reverb & Chad LeMans  

---

### **📈 STREAMING IMPACT**  
**Spotify**:  
- 4,109 followers | **78K+ monthly listeners** (Peak Feb 2025)  
- 11 tracks over 50K streams (*I Got the Keys*, *Back to the Beat*)  

**SoundCloud**:  
- 722K+ track plays (90-day average)  
- *Far From Done – Radio Edit* trending in 15+ underground playlists  

---

### **📱 SOCIAL PULSE**  
- **Instagram**: 4,875 followers | 9.8% MoM growth (2025)  
- **SoundCloud**: Viral traction in Mexico City & Berlin DJ circuits  
- **Emerging**: TikTok snippets gaining traction (#undergroundhouse)  

---

### **🚀 UPCOMING & CONTACT**  
**2025 Pipeline**:  
- EP *Neon Rhythms* (Q2 2025) – Hybrid afro-house/big room project  
- Collab with Miami-based producer PYM (TBA)
